contentBlocks.original:
रविसुधाकर वह्निलोचन रत्नकुण्डल भूषिणी
प्रविमलम्बुग मम्मुनेलिन भक्तजन चिन्तामणी ।
अवनि जनुलकु कॊङ्गुबङ्गारैन दैवशिखामणी
शिवुनि पट्टपुराणि गुणमणि श्रीगिरि भ्रमराम्बिका ॥ १ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ravisudhākara vahnilōchana ratnakuṇḍala bhūṣiṇī
pravimalambuga mammunēlina bhaktajana chintāmaṇī ।
avani janulaku koṅgubaṅgāraina daivaśikhāmaṇī
śivuni paṭṭapurāṇi guṇamaṇi śrīgiri bhramarāmbikā ॥ 1 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: O Goddess adorned with gem earrings, whose three eyes are the sun, moon and fire (ravisudhākara vahnilōchana ratnakuṇḍala bhūṣiṇī) — O spotless and supremely pure one who rules over us (pravimalambuga mammunēlina) — O wish-fulfilling gem for all devotees (bhaktajana chintāmaṇī) — O Mother of all the people of this earth (avani janulaku) — reveal yourself to us in your grace!

contentBlocks.original:
कलियुगम्बुन मानवुलकुनु कल्पतरुवै युण्डवा
वॆलयगुनु श्री शिखरमन्दुन विभवमै विलसिल्लवा ।
आलसिम्पक भक्तवरुलकु अष्टसम्पद लीयवा
जिलुगु कुङ्कुम कान्तिरेखल श्रीगिरि भ्रमराम्बिका ॥ २ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
kaliyugambuna mānavulakunu kalpataruvai yuṇḍavā
velayagunu śrī śikharamanduna vibhavamai vilasillavā ।
ālasimpaka bhaktavarulaku aṣṭasampada līyavā
jilugu kuṅkuma kāntirēkhala śrīgiri bhramarāmbikā ॥ 2 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: In this Kali age, will you not be like the wish-fulfilling tree for all humanity (kaliyugambuna mānavulakunu kalpataruvai yuṇḍavā)? O one who manifests gloriously on Śrī Śikhara — the sacred Śrīśailam hill — will you not shine forth in all your divine splendour (śrī śikharamanduna vibhavamai vilasillavā)? O Mother, do not delay — arise and bless us!

contentBlocks.original:
अङ्ग वङ्ग कलिङ्ग काश्मीरान्ध्र देशमुलन्दुनन्
पॊङ्गुचुनु वरहाल कॊङ्कण पुण्यभूमुल यन्दुनन् ।
रङ्गुगा कर्णाट राट मराट देशमुलन्दुनन्
शृङ्गिनी देशमुल वॆलसिन श्रीगिरि भ्रमराम्बिका ॥ ३ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
aṅga vaṅga kaliṅga kāśmīrāndhra dēśamulandunan
poṅguchunu varahāla koṅkaṇa puṇyabhūmula yandunan ।
raṅgugā karṇāṭa rāṭa marāṭa dēśamulandunan
śṛṅginī dēśamula velasina śrīgiri bhramarāmbikā ॥ 3 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: In the lands of Aṅga, Vaṅga, Kaliṅga, Kāśmīra and Āndhra (aṅga vaṅga kaliṅga kāśmīrāndhra dēśamulandunan), in the overflowing boon-granting sacred lands of Koṅkaṇa (varahāla koṅkaṇa puṇyabhūmula yandunan), in all of Karṇāṭaka and across all these holy regions — your divine presence and glory pervade all the sacred lands.

contentBlocks.original:
अक्षयम्बुग काशिलोपल अन्नपूर्ण भवानिवै
साक्षिगणपति कन्न तल्लिवि सद्गुणावति शाम्भवी ।
मोक्षमोसगॆडु कनकदुर्गवु मूलकारण शक्तिवि
शिक्षजेतुवु घोरभवमुल श्रीगिरि भ्रमराम्बिका ॥ ४ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
akṣayambuga kāśilōpala annapūrṇa bhavānivai
sākṣigaṇapati kanna tallivi sadguṇāvati śāmbhavī ।
mōkṣamōsageḍu kanakadurgavu mūlakāraṇa śaktivi
śikṣajētuvu ghōrabhavamula śrīgiri bhramarāmbikā ॥ 4 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: O eternal and imperishable goddess (akṣayambuga) — O Annapūrṇā, O Bhavānī within Kāśī (kāśilōpala annapūrṇa bhavānivai) — O Śāmbhavī, O mother who is witnessed and praised by Gaṇapati himself (sākṣigaṇapati kanna tallivi), endowed with all noble virtues (sadguṇāvati) — you are the goddess who grants liberation (mōkṣamōsageḍu) and all that is wished.

contentBlocks.original:
उग्रलोचन वरवधूमणि कॊप्पुगल्गिन भामिनी
विग्रहम्बुल कॆल्ल घनमै वॆलयु शोभनकारिणी ।
अग्रपीठमुनन्दु वॆलसिन आगमार्थ विचारिणी
शीघ्रमेकनि वरमुलित्तुवु श्रीगिरि भ्रमराम्बिका ॥ ५ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ugralōchana varavadhūmaṇi koppugalgina bhāminī
vigrahambula kella ghanamai velayu śōbhanakāriṇī ।
agrapīṭhamunandu velasina āgamārtha vichāriṇī
śīghramēkani varamulittuvu śrīgiri bhramarāmbikā ॥ 5 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: O goddess with fierce and blazing eyes (ugralōchana), O precious jewel among divine consorts (varavadhūmaṇi), O proud and spirited goddess (koppugalgina bhāminī), whose form shines as the greatest and most splendid of all (vigrahambula kella ghanamai), the bringer of all auspiciousness (velayu śōbhanakāriṇī) — O one who presides at the supreme sacred seat (agrapīṭhamunandu) — I bow to you.

contentBlocks.original:
निगमगोचर नीलकुण्डलि निर्मलाङ्गि निरञ्जनी
मिगुल चक्कनि पुष्पकोमलि मीननेत्र दयानिधी ।
जगतिलोन प्रसिद्धिकॆक्किन चन्द्रमुखि सीमन्तिनी
चिगुरुटाकुलवण्टि पॆदवुल श्रीगिरि भ्रमराम्बिका ॥ ६ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
nigamagōchara nīlakuṇḍali nirmalāṅgi nirañjanī
migula chakkani puṣpakōmali mīnanētra dayānidhī ।
jagatilōna prasiddhikekkina chandramukhi sīmantinī
chiguruṭākulavaṇṭi pedavula śrīgiri bhramarāmbikā ॥ 6 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: O one who transcends even the Vedas (nigamagōchara), O Nīlakuṇḍali (the blue-tressed one), the immaculate and stainless (nirmalāṅgi nirañjanī), O supremely beautiful one adorned with fragrant flowers (migula chakkani puṣpakōmali), with eyes like fish (mīnanētra), O ocean of compassion (dayānidhī), the most celebrated in all the worlds (jagatilōna prasid[dhā]) — bless me with your grace.

contentBlocks.original:
सोमशेखर पल्लवाधरि सुन्दरीमणी धीमणी
कोमलाङ्गि कृपापयोनिधि कुटिलकुन्तल योगिनी ।
ना मनम्बुन पायकुण्डम नगकुलेशुनि नन्दिनी
सीमलोन प्रसिद्धिकॆक्किन श्रीगिरि भ्रमराम्बिका ॥ ७ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
sōmaśēkhara pallavādhari sundarīmaṇī dhīmaṇī
kōmalāṅgi kṛpāpayōnidhi kuṭilakuntala yōginī ।
nā manambuna pāyakuṇḍama nagakulēśuni nandinī
sīmalōna prasiddhikekkina śrīgiri bhramarāmbikā ॥ 7 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: O consort of the crescent-moon-crested Śiva (sōmaśēkhara pallavādhari), O jewel of beauties (sundarīmaṇī), O wise and discerning one (dhīmaṇī), of tender and delicate form (kōmalāṅgi), O ocean of compassion (kṛpāpayōnidhi), with curling locks of hair (kuṭilakuntala), O great yoginī — may you never abandon my heart (nā manambuna pāyakuṇḍa)!

contentBlocks.original:
भूतनाथुनि वामभागमु पॊन्दुगा चेकॊन्दुवा
ख्यातिगनु श्रीशैलमुन विख्यातिगा नॆलकॊण्टिवा ।
पातकम्बुल पारद्रोलुचु भक्तुलनु चेकॊण्टिवा
श्वेतगिरिपै नुण्डि वॆलसिन श्रीगिरि भ्रमराम्बिका ॥ ८ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
bhūtanāthuni vāmabhāgamu pondugā chēkonduvā
khyātiganu śrīśailamuna vikhyātigā nelakoṇṭivā ।
pātakambula pāradrōluchu bhaktulanu chēkoṇṭivā
śvētagiripai nuṇḍi velasina śrīgiri bhramarāmbikā ॥ 8 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: You are united with Bhūtanātha — Lord Śiva — on his left side (bhūtanāthuni vāmabhāgamu pondugā chēkonduvā); you dwell gloriously and with great renown on Śrīśailam (khyātiganu śrīśailamuna vikhyātigā nelakoṇṭivā); you wash away all sins (pātakambula pāradrōlu) — O Bhramarāmbikā, reveal your grace!

contentBlocks.original:
ऎल्लवॆलसिन नीदु भावमु विष्णुलोकमु नन्दुन
पल्लविञ्चुनु नी प्रभावमु ब्रह्मलोकमु नन्दुन ।
तॆल्लमुग कैलासमन्दुन मूडुलोकमु लन्दुन
चॆल्लुनम्म त्रिलोकवासिनि श्रीगिरि भ्रमराम्बिका ॥ ९ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ellavelasina nīdu bhāvamu viṣṇulōkamu nanduna
pallaviñchunu nī prabhāvamu brahmalōkamu nanduna ।
tellamuga kailāsamanduna mūḍulōkamu landuna
chellunamma trilōkavāsini śrīgiri bhramarāmbikā ॥ 9 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Your divine presence ever shines (ellavelasina nīdu bhāvamu) in Viṣṇuloka (viṣṇulōkamu nanduna); your glory flourishes in Brahmaloka (brahmalōkamu nanduna pallaviñchunu); your radiance pervades Kailāsa itself (kailāsa[munu]) — O Goddess whose fame reaches all the divine realms — be gracious to your devoted servant.

contentBlocks.original:
तरुणि श्रीगिरि मल्लिकार्जुन दैवरायल भामिनी
करुणतो मम्मेलु यॆप्पुडु कल्पवृक्षमु भङ्गिनी ।
वरुसतो नी यष्टकम्बुनु व्रासि चदिविन वारिकि
सिरुलनिच्चॆद वॆल्ल कालमु श्रीगिरि भ्रमराम्बिका ॥ १० ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
taruṇi śrīgiri mallikārjuna daivarāyala bhāminī
karuṇatō mammēlu yeppuḍu kalpavṛkṣamu bhaṅginī ।
varusatō nī yaṣṭakambunu vrāsi chadivina vāriki
sirulanichcheda vella kālamu śrīgiri bhramarāmbikā ॥ 10 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: O youthful goddess, O consort of Mallikārjuna on the divine Śrī Giri (taruṇi śrīgiri mallikārjuna daivarāyala bhāminī), ever bless me with your grace at all times (karuṇatō mammēlu yeppuḍu) — O one who is like the wish-fulfilling tree in full bloom (kalpavṛkṣamu bhaṅginī) — may your divine staff of grace (nī yaṣṭa) always protect me. Victory to Goddess Bhramarāmbikā of Śrīśailam!
